case_title: ANGELA WASHINGTON VS. S D PATEL et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, N D DBA NEW PACIFIC HOTEL
AUTHORIZED TO APPEAR FORM SC109 - FILED BY DEFENDANT S.D. PATEL IN OPEN COURT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, ANGELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATEL, S D DBA NEW PACIFIC HOTEL ND PATEL DBA NEW PACIFIC HOTEL IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ND PATEL DBA AS NEW PACIFIC HOTEL IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-10-2011 AT 3:30PM.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, ANGELA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-15-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, N D DBA NEW PACIFIC HOTEL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WASHINGTON, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, S D DBA NEW PACIFIC HOTEL PATEL, N D DBA NEW PACIFIC HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2011 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF, ANGELA WASHINGTON AND BRUCE BURGE, APPEARING FOR SD PATEL AND ND PATEL WERE PRESENT AT THE HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK REGINA DENNIS, NOT REPORTED (506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, S D DBA NEW PACIFIC HOTEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-15-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, S D DBA NEW PACIFIC HOTEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF 08-10-11, JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. PARTIES PRESENT, AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD AND ARGUED, THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT.
